prompt: Run a full review on this checked-out PR. It's a Python FastAPI backend with a Jinja2 template for order confirmations. The PR adds an orders endpoint and order model.
assertions: The report identifies the SQL injection in the orders endpoint
The report identifies missing input validation (negative amounts)
The report identifies the missing authentication decorator
The report identifies the mutable default argument bug
The report identifies missing __hash__ when __eq__ is defined
New pytest tests were created for the orders endpoint
New pytest tests were created for the Order model
The Jinja2 template was identified as a UI change requiring visual verification
E2E or visual testing was attempted for the order confirmation template
The SQL injection was fixed in the source code
The mutable default argument was fixed
A pr-review-report.md file was generated with all required sections
A git commit was created with the fixes and new tests
